HAKUREIREIMU-HAKUREI_GOHEI.title: Hakurei's Gohei
HAKUREIREIMU-HAKUREI_GOHEI.flavor: Reimu's usual gohei. Hurts alot when people are hit by it.
HAKUREIREIMU-HAKUREI_GOHEI.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]{Orbs}[/blue] [gold]Yin-Yang Orb[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-MORIYA_GOHEI.title: Moriya's Gohei
HAKUREIREIMU-MORIYA_GOHEI.flavor: Sanae's gohei. How did it end up in here?
HAKUREIREIMU-MORIYA_GOHEI.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Miracle[/gold] into your hand.
HAKUREIREIMU-SAISEN_BOX.title: Saisen Box
HAKUREIREIMU-SAISEN_BOX.flavor: The saisen box has no money in it!
HAKUREIREIMU-ULTRAMARINE_ORB_ELIXIR.flav: Is it the past or the future that you see?
HAKUREIREIMU-ULTRAMARINE_ORB_ELIXIR.desc: Upon pickup, select a card from the latest [gold]victorious[/gold] deck to obtain.
HAKUREIREIMU-ULTRAMARINE_ORB_ELIXIR.sele: Select card to add to your deck
HAKUREIREIMU-WOODEN_FISH.title: Wooden Fish
HAKUREIREIMU-WOODEN_FISH.flavor: You can seems to hear a faint echo coming from it.
HAKUREIREIMU-WOODEN_FISH.description: You permanently have [gold]Counter Attack[/gold]: Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Card.
HAKUREIREIMU-OLD_MIKO_COSTUME.title: Old Miko Costume
HAKUREIREIMU-OLD_MIKO_COSTUME.flavor: It remains spotless even after a long time has pass.
HAKUREIREIMU-OLD_MIKO_COSTUME.descriptio: At the start of each combat, place a [gold]Duplex Barrier[/gold] with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] onto the battlefield.
HAKUREIREIMU-BOUNDARY_SENSOR.title: Boundary Sensor
HAKUREIREIMU-BOUNDARY_SENSOR.flavor: Can discover boundaries that are difficult to perceive.
HAKUREIREIMU-BOUNDARY_SENSOR.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional cards with [gold]Counter[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-UNLUCKY_TALISMAN.title: Unlucky Talisman
HAKUREIREIMU-UNLUCKY_TALISMAN.flavor: Suffering from the invasion of an unknown power. It will bring forth the power misfortune.
HAKUREIREIMU-UNLUCKY_TALISMAN.descriptio: Whenever an enemy dies, transfer any [gold]Seal[/gold] it has to ALL other enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-AUTONOMOUS_YIN_YANG_JADE.fl: This Yin-Yang Orb craves the enemy's blood.
HAKUREIREIMU-PLACEHOLDER.title: 占位符
